option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/glauc/OneDrive/Documents/Projetos/Fotografia/Pycharm/pythonProject2":"{\"/WIP2.py\":\"This file appears to be a Python script that interacts with the Tkinter GUI library to display and extract EXIF data from image files. It also includes some utility functions and imports from other modules. There are no defined classes in this file, but the following functions are present:\\n\\n`get_exif(filepath, tag_name)`: Retrieves the value of a specific EXIF tag from the image file at the given filepath.\\n\\nThe main purpose of this script is to open an image file, extract its EXIF data, and print the tag names and their corresponding values. It also demonstrates how to use the `rawpy` and `imageio` libraries to handle RAW image formats like `.arw`.\",\"/Ajudante.py\":\"`Ajudante`: A class that provides a graphical user interface (GUI) to help users copy images from a source folder to a destination folder, with additional features such as progress tracking and error handling.\\n\\n`browse_folder`: A function that allows the user to select a folder using a file dialog and updates the corresponding entry field in the GUI.\\n\\nThis file is a Python script that provides a tool for copying images from a source folder to a destination folder. It has a GUI that allows the user to select the source and destination folders, as well as the file formats to be copied. The script also includes features such as progress tracking, error handling, and feedback on missing images.\",\"/brackets_sorter.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It defines the following functions:\\n\\n`exif`: Extracts the EXIF data from an image file and returns the value of a specified EXIF tag.\\n\\n`process_files`: Processes a directory of image files, categorizing them as unbracketed, medians, or outliers based on their exposure bias values.\\n\\n`is_bracketed`: Determines whether an image file is bracketed based on its EXIF data.\\n\\n`ExposureBiasValue`: Retrieves the exposure bias value from the EXIF data of an image file.\\n\\nThe file also includes a main block that demonstrates the usage of the defined functions. It processes a directory of image files, creates subdirectories for non-HDR and HDR images, and copies the files to the appropriate directories.\",\"/copiador_de_arquivo.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It contains the following function:\\n\\n`copia_arquivo`: This function copies a file from a source location to a destination location, with optional parameters for file type and delay time.\\n\\nThe file appears to be a utility script that provides a function for copying files from one location to another, with some error handling and default parameter values.\",\"/tools.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It contains the following functions:\\n\\n`get_exif`: Retrieves the EXIF data from an image file, handling different file formats.\\n\\n`file_navigator`: Generates the file path for the next or previous image in a sequence based on the current file path.\\n\\n`is_it_showable`: Determines whether an image should be displayed or not based on its EXIF data and bracketing information.\\n\\n`get_destination_dir`: Generates the destination directory path for selected images based on the source directory.\\n\\n`wanted_files`: (Legacy function) Retrieves a list of files with neutral exposure values or non-bracketed files.\\n\\n`exif`: (Legacy function) Retrieves the EXIF data for a specific tag from an image file.\\n\\nThe file appears to be a utility for managing and processing image files, with a focus on handling bracketed exposures and determining which images should be displayed.\",\"/archive/file_navigate - is already included in tools.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It contains the following function:\\n\\n`file_navigate`: This function takes a file path and a number of steps, and returns the file path of the next or previous file in a sequence of files with a consistent naming convention.\",\"/brackets_rejoiner.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It contains the following functions:\\n\\n`ExposureBiasValue`: Extracts the exposure bias value from the EXIF data of an image file.\\n\\n`brackets_rejoiner`: Searches for the target darker and lighter files associated with the current file and copies them to the output folder.\\n\\n`find_associated_bracketed_images`: Iterates over the files in the database folder, calls the `brackets_rejoiner` function for each file, and creates the output folder if it doesn\\u0027t exist.\\n\\nThe file is designed to find and copy the associated bracketed images for a given set of image files, based on the exposure bias value extracted from the EXIF data.\",\"/archive/OOP.py\":\"`CARRO`: A class that represents a car with properties such as year and name.\\n\\n`set_name`: A method that sets the name of the car and prints it.\\n\\n`get_name`: A method that returns the name of the car.\\n\\n`main`: The main function that creates a car object, sets its name, and creates a new thread to set the name again.\\n\\nThis file demonstrates the use of a class to represent a car and the use of threads to modify the car\\u0027s name concurrently.\",\"/WIP.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It contains the following functions:\\n\\n`generate_data`: Generates a synthetic signal with noise.\\n`create_dataset`: Prepares the dataset for different window sizes.\\n`build_model`: Defines the model architecture for an LSTM-based time series prediction model.\\n\\nThe file also benchmarks different configurations of the LSTM model by varying the window size, LSTM units, and number of epochs. It plots the training and validation loss for each configuration and prints the final loss and validation loss for each configuration.\",\"/archive/exemplo_ooo.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It contains the following functions:\\n\\n`troca_cor`: This function takes a car color and a new color, and returns the new color.\\n\\n`troca_cor2`: This function takes a new color and returns it.\\n\\n`main`: This function sets the initial colors of two cars, calls the `troca_cor2` function to change the color of the first car, and then prints the new color of the first car.\\n\\nThe file appears to be a simple program that demonstrates the use of functions to change the color of cars.\",\"/anubis.py\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. It is a Python script that sorts files between \\\"good\\\" and \\\"bad\\\" HDRs (High Dynamic Range) based on their file names. The script assumes that all \\\"bad\\\" files are complete and it copies the \\\"good\\\" files to a separate directory while skipping the \\\"bad\\\" files. It also keeps track of the number of \\\"good\\\" and \\\"bad\\\" files processed and prints the summary at the end.\"}"}

option.name: fileSkeletonMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/glauc/OneDrive/Documents/Projetos/Fotografia/Pycharm/pythonProject2":"{\"/archive/exemplo_ooo.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/archive/exemplo_ooo.py\",\"file_name\":\"exemplo_ooo.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"troca_cor\",\"method_parameters\":\"(carro_cor,nova_cor)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"carro_cor\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"nova_cor\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[2,0],[4,20]]},{\"method_name\":\"troca_cor2\",\"method_parameters\":\"(nova_cor)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"nova_cor\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[6,0],[7,19]]},{\"method_name\":\"main\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[9,0],[19,21]]}]},\"/archive/file_navigate - is already included in tools.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/archive/file_navigate - is already included in tools.py\",\"file_name\":\"file_navigate - is already included in tools.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"file_navigate\",\"method_parameters\":\"(file_path, steps)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"file_path\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"steps\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[2,0],[18,24]]}]},\"/archive/OOP.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/archive/OOP.py\",\"file_name\":\"OOP.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"__init__\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self,ano,name)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"ano\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"name\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[3,4],[5,24]]},{\"method_name\":\"set_name\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self,name)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"name\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[8,4],[10,24]]},{\"method_name\":\"get_name\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[12,4],[13,20]]},{\"method_name\":\"main\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[17,0],[24,25]]}]},\"/Ajudante.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/Ajudante.py\",\"file_name\":\"Ajudante.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"__init__\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self, debugging \\u003d False, enable_gui \\u003d True)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"},{\"type\":\"False\",\"name\":\"debugging\"},{\"type\":\"True\",\"name\":\"enable_gui\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[8,4],[72,43]]},{\"method_name\":\"excecuter\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self, event\\u003dNone)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"},{\"type\":\"None\",\"name\":\"event\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[74,4],[90,21]]},{\"method_name\":\"get_user_input\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[92,4],[112,134]]},{\"method_name\":\"file_finder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[114,4],[133,94]]},{\"method_name\":\"file_copier\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self, path, file_name)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"path\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"file_name\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[135,4],[154,44]]},{\"method_name\":\"closer\",\"method_parameters\":\"(self)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"self\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[156,4],[178,96]]},{\"method_name\":\"browse_folder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(entry)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"entry\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[180,0],[183,31]]}]},\"/anubis.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/anubis.py\",\"file_name\":\"anubis.py\",\"methods\":[]},\"/brackets_rejoiner.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/brackets_rejoiner.py\",\"file_name\":\"brackets_rejoiner.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"ExposureBiasValue\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filepath)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filepath\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[10,0],[25,73]]},{\"method_name\":\"brackets_rejoiner\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filename, median_folder, output_folder)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filename\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"median_folder\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"output_folder\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[27,0],[61,26]]},{\"method_name\":\"find_associated_bracketed_images\",\"method_parameters\":\"(database_folder, median_folder, output_folder)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"database_folder\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"median_folder\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"output_folder\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[63,0],[76,72]]}]},\"/brackets_sorter.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/brackets_sorter.py\",\"file_name\":\"brackets_sorter.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"exif\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filename, gettag)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filename\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"gettag\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[8,0],[17,19]]},{\"method_name\":\"process_files\",\"method_parameters\":\"(source_dir, lower_limit\\u003d-0.7, upper_limit\\u003d0.3)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"source_dir\"},{\"type\":\"-0.7\",\"name\":\"lower_limit\"},{\"type\":\"0.3\",\"name\":\"upper_limit\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[19,0],[41,42]]},{\"method_name\":\"is_bracketed\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filename)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filename\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[43,0],[51,20]]},{\"method_name\":\"ExposureBiasValue\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filename)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filename\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[53,0],[55,53]]}]},\"/copiador_de_arquivo.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/copiador_de_arquivo.py\",\"file_name\":\"copiador_de_arquivo.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"copia_arquivo\",\"method_parameters\":\"(source_dir, filename, destination_dir, filetype\\u003d\\u0027jpg\\u0027, delay\\u003d10)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"source_dir\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filename\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"destination_dir\"},{\"type\":\"\\u0027jpg\\u0027\",\"name\":\"filetype\"},{\"type\":\"10\",\"name\":\"delay\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[3,0],[25,10]]}]},\"/tools.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/tools.py\",\"file_name\":\"tools.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"get_exif\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filepath, gettag)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filepath\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"gettag\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[5,0],[22,19]]},{\"method_name\":\"file_navigator\",\"method_parameters\":\"(file_path, steps)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"file_path\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"steps\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[24,0],[139,42]]},{\"method_name\":\"is_it_showable\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filepaths)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filepaths\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[145,0],[427,19]]},{\"method_name\":\"v2\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[164,4],[194,118]]},{\"method_name\":\"vChatGPT\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[196,4],[257,118]]},{\"method_name\":\"vGlauco\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[259,4],[316,118]]},{\"method_name\":\"vAndressa\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[318,4],[357,118]]},{\"method_name\":\"vMedia\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[359,4],[426,21]]},{\"method_name\":\"get_destination_dir\",\"method_parameters\":\"(source_dir)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"source_dir\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[429,0],[444,26]]},{\"method_name\":\"wanted_files\",\"method_parameters\":\"(dir)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"dir\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[446,0],[457,24]]},{\"method_name\":\"exif\",\"method_parameters\":\"(filename, gettag)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"filename\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"gettag\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[459,0],[469,19]]}]},\"/WIP.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/WIP.py\",\"file_name\":\"WIP.py\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"generate_data\",\"method_parameters\":\"(n_samples\\u003d1000)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"1000\",\"name\":\"n_samples\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[10,0],[20,25]]},{\"method_name\":\"create_dataset\",\"method_parameters\":\"(data, window_size)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"data\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"window_size\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[24,0],[29,35]]},{\"method_name\":\"build_model\",\"method_parameters\":\"(window_size, lstm_units\\u003d[50, 50])\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"window_size\"},{\"type\":\"[50, 50]\",\"name\":\"lstm_units\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[33,0],[43,16]]}]},\"/WIP2.py\":{\"file_path\":\"/WIP2.py\",\"file_name\":\"WIP2.py\",\"methods\":[]}}"}
